query:
-- 查询所有老师总数
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_teachers
FROM users
WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%';

-- 查询有城市映射的老师数量
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as teachers_with_cities
FROM user_role_cities
WHERE role = 'teacher';

-- 查询所有老师及其城市映射情况
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.roles,
  urc.cities,
  CASE 
    WHEN urc.cities IS NULL THEN '无城市映射'
    WHEN urc.cities = '[]' THEN '空城市列表'
    ELSE '有城市映射'
  END as mapping_status
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId AND urc.role = 'teacher'
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%teacher%'
ORDER BY mapping_status, u.name
LIMIT 20;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_teachers
FROM users
WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%';

-- 查询有城市映射的老师数量
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as teachers_with_cities

WHERE role = 'teacher';

-- 查询所有老师及其城市映射情况
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.roles,
  urc.cities,
  CASE 
    WHEN urc.cities IS NULL THEN '无城市映射'
    WHEN urc.cities = '[]' THEN '空城市列表'
    ELSE '有城市映射'
  END as mapping_status
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId AND urc.role = 'teacher'
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%teacher%'
ORDER BY mapping_status, u.name
LIMIT 20;
